heaviest_rainfall.status: On 09 November 2025, a record rainfall of 47.89mm was measured, indicating an exceptionally wet day.  24.6mm per hour was recorded as falling at times during the 144.8 hour storm.

heaviest_rainrate.status: 34.3mm per hour is the maximum rain rate ever recorded on 02 September 2025, during a 15.0 hour storm which dumped 21.19mm of rain from the clouds.

longest_rain.status: On 09 November 2025, the rain lasted for 144.8 hours, which is the longest time recorded by our database.  47.89mm accumulated and it fell at 24.6mm per hour at times.

most_lightning.status: The most lightning strikes in one day since 11 April 2025 is 23 and it happened on 07 September 2025.

storm.status: A storm is passing through the area.  This marks the first storm since 02 January 2026.

top_10_dry.status: The longest dry period started on 24 April 2025 and lasted for 19 days.

top_10_rainy.status: The longest rainy period started on 26 November 2025 and lasted for 14 days.

cold_snaps.status: There is not an active cold snap.  There has been 1 so far this year, while the average is 3.6.

extreme.status: The maximum temperature difference seen is 26.7°C, observed on 29 April 2025 when the temperature fell to 0.4°C but also managed to reach 27.1°C on the same day.

heatwaves.status: There is currently no heatwaves.  This year there have been 0 heatwavess, usually there are 1.9 heatwavess per year.

tropical.status: The most recent tropical night was on 18 July 2025 and this has only occurred 62 times since 1973.

average.status: The current average daily wind direction is southerly (195°).  In the UK, a southerly wind usually brings milder, moist air from the Atlantic.

gusts.status: The top recorded wind gust is 93.7 mph on 13 October 2012.

run.status: The highest wind run ever seen is 1737 miles on 21 October 2012.

speed.status: The largest wind speed ever was on 13 October 2012 with a value of 93.7 mph.

top_10_windy.status: The longest windy period started on 11 October 2012 and lasted for 21 days.

summary.description:
Today, a bit warmer for the feels like temperature (up 7.1°C), outside temperature (up 6.3°C), and inside temperature (up 2.5°C), more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 7%), and drier conditions in rainfall (down 0.1 mm).

The past week and month had observable variation in cloud levels (up 475 m), inside temperature (up 1.9°C), feels like temperature (down 5.3°C), and outside temperature (down 4.6°C) when compared to today.

cloud levels.description:
Today’s average cloud levels is 405.7m lower than yesterday, 475.3m lower than the past week, 410.4m lower than the past month.

Yesterday, the cloud levels ranged from a minimum of 708m to a maximum of 1548m, averaging 719.0m; the past week and month had slightly higher averages of 1194.3m and 1129.4m respectively.
cloud levels.summary: Expect overcast skies with low cloud.

summary.summary: Inside; prepare for cold weather. Outside; prepare for cold, chilly weather ahead. Also, dry and less humid conditions and winds will be practically absent. Possible light showers, overcast skies with low cloud, and it’s dark. The weather may change rapidly and become worse.

washing.phrase: The current weather conditions are not suitable as it is raining.
